full_text:
He Jin (Suigao) 何進 (遂高)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Jin (何進), styledSuigao (遂高), was born in Wan City, Nan Yang Commandery. Grand General in the Han courts, but was assassinated by the eunuchs. He Jin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. He Jin lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
